Hi, apologies for the delay — I'll update the credentials for Idaho, Minnesota, Kentucky, Alabama, and New Jersey today and confirm once done.

Rob

actions.subject: Payout Funding Model Question
actions.preview: Since we are using only the payouts option, how does funding work?
actions.summary: Yuliy replied adding Group VP Finance Jack Zhang and asking how the escrow funding model works for a payout-only setup. Roby sent the settlement form but didn't answer the funding question.
actions.draft:
Hi Yuliy and Jack, for the payout-only setup, you fund a merchant escrow account on our side and we draw from that to fulfil payouts. I'll send across the account details for the initial top-up separately.

Rob
